//AzureAd: Workforce (staff) tenant + rplus-api app registration. Tenant/client IDs are public identifiers, not secrets. Overridable per-env via AzureAd__* env vars.
//AzureAdCustomer: Customer (CIAM / External ID) tenant + rplus-api-ext app registration. ClientId is the API audience. Public identifiers, not secrets. Overridable per-env via AzureAdCustomer__* env vars.
//Cors: SPA origins. Empty here; localhost set in appsettings.Development.json; the DEV SWA host injected by the pipeline (Cors__AllowedOrigins__0).
